_note: Plain-English summaries of the latest substantive Jira comment per in-flight card, distilled by the pull-time agent from the raw comment threads (markup/scheduling chatter stripped). The generator renders these deterministically and flags staleness from `date`. 'author' is who wrote the source comment; a bot/automation author is labeled as such, not the assignee.

TTD-94.author: Bong Lee
TTD-94.summary: Order history and order-edit features are complete; quote-to-sales-order conversion is still in progress. Target dates: feature-complete 6/19, beta testing 6/22–7/02, wider release 7/03.

TTD-288.author: Jordan Serna
TTD-288.summary: Automated smoke and landing-page test suites pass with up to 6 simultaneous users. Checkout/submit suite is under development. Still to come: customer-page, product-page, and edge-case tests.

TTD-155.author: Jeff Liang
TTD-155.summary: Uploading Clark Construction's pricing now (a few days to finish). Wrapping up the invoicing piece, expected complete next week.

TTD-181.author: Dev automation (QA)
TTD-181.summary: Server-side automation passed QA in the sandbox on 6/10. Remaining before production: customer-service browser testing and an RF-SMART compatibility check — no code changes expected.

TTD-179.author: Shyam Menon
TTD-179.summary: Fix is complete and ready for sandbox testing; can go to production once approved. Awaiting sign-off from Solomon.

TTD-279.author: Bong Lee
TTD-279.summary: Issue appears isolated to one user (Ruben); needs further troubleshooting with him to resolve.
